# wa-hub-demo

> Self-hosted WhatsApp HTTP API (REST + JSON + HMAC-signed webhooks), powered by Baileys.
> Precondition for any send: a WhatsApp device must be paired once (scan a QR at /pair); confirm with
> GET /api/instance/status → connection:"connected", else sends return 503 not_connected.
> Auth: header `Authorization: Bearer <HUB_TOKEN>` on every /api/* call. Two secrets: HUB_TOKEN (call the
> API) and WEBHOOK_SECRET (verify HMAC-SHA256 over the raw webhook body, header x-hub-signature).

## Integrate (read these first)
- [Integration guide](docs/INTEGRATION.md): the complete how-to — pairing, the two secrets, every endpoint, webhook signature verification (Node + Python). Start here.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): the 60-second model and a "where to look" map for AI agents.
- [openapi.yaml](openapi.yaml): machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 spec for import/codegen.
- [API reference](docs/API.md): exhaustive endpoint-by-endpoint field reference.
- [Webhook receiver example](examples/base44/webhook-receiver.ts): reference implementation.
- [curl recipes](examples/curl/README.md)

## Operate the server (optional — not needed to integrate)
- [Deploy notes](docs/DEPLOY.md)
- [Stable subdomain](docs/SUBDOMAIN.md)
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)

## Legal
- [Disclaimer / acceptable use](DISCLAIMER.md): unofficial client; may violate WhatsApp ToS; consenting recipients only.
